bug.description: cross-layer parameter mismatch between PHY, MAC, and RRC causing inconsistent operation

prompt:
There is a cross-layer parameter mismatch between PHY, MAC, and RRC causing inconsistent operation downstream of function emm_fsm_process in the openair3/NAS/UE subsystem.
The function is located at openair3/NAS/UE/EMM/SAP/emm_fsm.c:270.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
